judgment.summary: Strong revenue growth and robust free cash flow are tempered by negative profit margins and a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 1.65 beat the 1.47 estimate by 12.1%, with the next earnings date on 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth of 26.7% shows strong top-line momentum.
Gross margin of 71.7% indicates high product profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $463.32M shows the business is generating significant cash.
Total cash of $2.39B provides a massive liquidity cushion against $62.83M in total debt.
negatives: Profit margin of -2.9% indicates the company is not yet profitable.
Forward P/E of 43.68x suggests a high valuation.
Quarterly earnings growth of -1.9% shows a recent deceleration in earnings.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.13 indicates a high level of leverage.

news.paragraph: MongoDB is navigating a mix of growth catalysts and price pressure, highlighted by the announcement of new AI data platform capabilities and a positive catalyst watch from Citi. While expansion efforts and analyst target price lifts provide potential upside, the stock has recently faced downward pressure due to a lack of near-term estimate upside. Options traders should monitor these product developments and analyst sentiment against recent share price volatility.
